name: agent-session-canvas
description: Install, diagnose, start, and open the local AGENT Session Canvas app.

interface.shortDescription: Install and open the local session canvas
interface.longDescription: A thin controller for installing, diagnosing, starting, and opening the real local AGENT Session Canvas at localhost:4517. It does not ship a second UI or operate a hosted session map.
defaultPrompt: Install or open my local AGENT Session Canvas
